configurations.name: Fork: npm run watch
configurations.command: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$forkRoot = '${input:forkRoot}'; if (-not (Test-Path $forkRoot)) { throw ('Fork path not found: ' + $forkRoot) }; Set-Location $forkRoot; npm run watch"

inputs.description: Absolute path to the local VS Code fork checkout.
